name: Kukuye Sabzi (Herb Omelet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry all vegetables and herbs thoroughly before chopping and measuring.
2. If desired, chop quickly in a food processor.
3. Combine greens in a bowl. Mix flour with 1 teaspoon salt and pepper to taste and sprinkle over greens; toss well.
4. Beat eggs until frothy and pour over greens. Stir well to combine and adjust seasoning.
5. Heat butter in a 9-inch round casserole dish or deep cake pan in a moderate oven until it coats the sides.
6. Pour in the egg mixture.
7. Bake in a moderate oven, one shelf above the center, for 45-50 minutes, or until set and lightly browned on top.
8. If not sufficiently browned when set, briefly place under a hot grill.
9. Serve hot, cut into wedges, with yogurt and flatbread. Also good served cold. Serves 4.
